expectations.text: A new file docs/notes/us###.md was created in the sandbox
expectations.evidence: Old skill wrote product/stories.yaml — no docs/notes/us*.md created

expectations.text: Filename slug matches us<NNN>.md with three-digit zero-padded sequential id
expectations.evidence: Wrote stories.yaml with id 2605-001 (yymm-NNN), not us###

expectations.text: ID does not collide with existing us001/us002/us003/us013/us014 (so id is us015 or higher)
YAML frontmatter contains aliases (list), status, created keys
expectations.evidence: No zettel written; old skill emits a YAML list entry, not zettel frontmatter
Status field exists in YAML entry, but not in zettel frontmatter

expectations.text: created frontmatter value matches ISO date YYYY-MM-DD
## role section contains wikilink [[pn001|requestor]] referencing the existing persona
expectations.evidence: Role recorded as plain string 'requestor', no wikilink

expectations.text: ## want section describes cancelling a submitted request
expectations.evidence: No body section — just YAML want: field

expectations.text: ## because section explains realizing wrong samples / ordered incorrectly
expectations.evidence: Recorded under so_that/because YAML field, not a body section

expectations.text: ## acceptance_criteria has exactly 3 bullets matching the user's input
expectations.evidence: Criteria captured in YAML list, not as markdown body bullets
